ksa_text: Conduct threat modeling and assessment to identify threat actors, characterize attack surfaces, analyze threat criticality, and evaluate insider threats.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of risk management models and frameworks

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-006 (Risk Management/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.437, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.437). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data product management: product roadmap, data product design, consumer needs, data contracts, SLAs, self-serve data infrastructure, and cross-functional stakeholder alignment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.437, and Risk Management (RM) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk Management KSA for Data Product Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management competencies do not appear as Data Product Manager requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. Risk Management is not a Data Product Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
